channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: JD Vance explains what brought him back to faith after seeing Christians had life figured out
item.description: Vice President JD Vance discusses his spiritual journey in his new book 'Communion,' describing how Christianity gave him direction after years of seeking success.

item.title: Homeland Security denies anti-ICE New Jersey Democrats access to Delaney Hall, citing reality
Dick Morris tells Newsmax Iran deal improves GOP midterm prospects
item.description: Political analyst Dick Morris said on Newsmax Friday that the end of the Iran-U.S. conflict will benefit President Donald Trump and Republicans.

item.title: Feel-Good Friday: High school graduate surprised by active-duty USAF father greeting him on stage
